data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Member-only pricing and early access', but the evidence provided does not confirm that this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions various membership tiers and pricing but lacks specific details on member-only pricing or early access features. This indicates a gap in the evidence needed to confirm the requirement's coverage, as it does not provide concrete examples or endpoints that demonstrate these features.
gaps: No evidence of member-only pricing or early access features.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Define member-only pricing and early access endpoints
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that member-only pricing and early access features are implemented and accessible.
